---
title: 'Introduction to probabilities'
teaching: 10
exercises: 2
---

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: questions 

- What is probability?
- What is probability distribution?

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: objectives

- Understand and interpret probability
- Understand probability distribution

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

## Introduction

## What is probability?
